messages.content: ¿podrías corregirme esto? Hello Peter, if you want finish of the mosth with money, you must do anythings, for example you have had heard, your have know some strategic how you will impact on your finances satisfactory
Hello Peter, if you want to end the month with more money, you must take action. For example, you should learn about strategic ways to have a positive impact on your finances.
¿podrías corregirme esto? First, you should give priority to the more important costs, and minimize others less important
First, you should prioritize the more important expenses and minimize the less important ones.
¿podrías corregirme esto? Prioritize the more important expenses and minimize others less important
Prioritize the most important expenses and minimize the less important ones.
¿cómo se traduce en ingles B1 y dar importancia a los gastos mayores y minimizar los otros menos importantes?

B1 se traduce al inglés como "B1" ya que es una clasificación específica del Marco Común Europeo de Referencia para las lenguas. 

"Dar importancia a los gastos mayores y minimizar los otros menos importantes" se traduce al inglés como "Give priority to major expenses and minimize the less important ones".
¿Me puedes corregir esto? when you go at supermarket, you must be clever, you have to buy food with guality but with down price
When you go to the supermarket, you must be clever. You have to buy quality food at a lower price.
¿podrías corregirme esto? YOu have to buy guality food and cheep
You have to buy quality food at an affordable price.
¿podrías corregirme esto? you could save if you cook your food and do not go to the restaurant for meals too
You could save money by cooking your own food instead of going to the restaurant for meals too often.
¿Podrías corregirme? Other ways could be looking for the most cheap insurance policies of the car, home, life
Other ways could be to look for the cheapest car, home, and life insurance policies.

¿podrdías corregirme? I hope hear of you and about you finances, i am sure that you Will be rich very soon.
Cheers,
I hope to hear from you and learn about your finances. I am sure that you will become rich very soon. Cheers,
¿ puedes corregirme? I hope to hear from you good news. I am sure that you will be rich very soon. Cheers
I hope to hear good news from you. I am sure that you will become rich very soon. Cheers!

¿ Me puedes corregir? Hello José,
I like doing one correction,  " Lifre is a mistake, the good word is LIfe"

Hello José,

I would like to make one correction: "Lifre" is a mistake, the correct word is "Life".
